label: Recipe maker properties
description: Controls how and where this thing is crafted, including workbench requirements, skill gates, research prerequisites, and ingredient behavior.

label.label: Label
label.description: Display name override for the recipe in the bills UI.

productCount.label: Product count
productCount.description: Number of items produced per completed recipe run.

targetCountAdjustment.label: Target count adjustment
targetCountAdjustment.description: Adjusts the target-count prompt when the player sets a bill quantity.

bulkRecipeCount.label: Bulk recipe count
bulkRecipeCount.description: Minimum count at which a bulk (faster per-unit) recipe unlocks. -1 disables bulk recipes.

useIngredientsForColor.label: Use ingredients for color
useIngredientsForColor.description: If true, the product's color is derived from the dominant stuff ingredient.

productHasIngredientStuff.label: Product has ingredient stuff
productHasIngredientStuff.description: If true, the product's stuff type is copied from the primary stuff ingredient.

workAmount.label: Work amount
workAmount.description: Total work ticks required to complete one run. -1 uses the WorkToMake stat.

workSpeedStat.label: Work speed stat
workSpeedStat.description: StatDef on the worker pawn that multiplies work speed for this recipe.

workTableSpeedStat.label: Work table speed stat
workTableSpeedStat.description: StatDef on the worktable that multiplies work speed for this recipe.

workTableEfficiencyStat.label: Work table efficiency stat
workTableEfficiencyStat.description: StatDef on the worktable that multiplies ingredient efficiency.

efficiencyStat.label: Efficiency stat
efficiencyStat.description: StatDef on the worker that controls ingredient efficiency.

skillRequirements.label: Skill requirements
skillRequirements.description: Minimum skill levels the worker pawn must have to perform this recipe.

workSkill.label: Work skill
workSkill.description: SkillDef the worker gains XP in while performing this recipe.

workSkillLearnPerTick.label: Work skill learn per tick
workSkillLearnPerTick.description: XP gained per work tick in the workSkill.

requiredGiverWorkType.label: Required giver work type
requiredGiverWorkType.description: WorkTypeDef the worker pawn must have enabled to perform this recipe.

mechanitorWorkType.label: Mechanitor work type
mechanitorWorkType.description: WorkTypeDef assigned to mechaniods that perform this recipe.

mechanitorOnlyRecipe.label: Mechanitor only recipe
mechanitorOnlyRecipe.description: If true, this recipe can only be performed by mechanoids.

mechanitorFixedIngredients.label: Mechanitor fixed ingredients
mechanitorFixedIngredients.description: If true, the mechaniod uses a fixed ingredient list rather than player-configured filters.

unfinishedThingDef.label: Unfinished thing def
unfinishedThingDef.description: ThingDef used for the in-progress item placed on the workbench while the recipe runs.

effectWorking.label: Effect working
effectWorking.description: EffecterDef played at the workbench while the recipe is being worked.

soundWorking.label: Sound working
soundWorking.description: SoundDef played while the recipe is being worked.

recipeUsers.label: Recipe users
recipeUsers.description: ThingDef references for buildings where this recipe can be performed.

researchPrerequisite.label: Research prerequisite
researchPrerequisite.description: Single ResearchProjectDef that must be completed before this recipe is unlocked.

researchPrerequisites.label: Research prerequisites
researchPrerequisites.description: All listed ResearchProjectDefs must be completed before this recipe is unlocked.

memePrerequisitesAny.label: Meme prerequisites (any)
memePrerequisitesAny.description: At least one of these MemeDefs must be active in the colony's ideoligion to unlock this recipe.

factionPrerequisiteTags.label: Faction prerequisite tags
factionPrerequisiteTags.description: At least one faction with a matching tag must exist on the world for this recipe to appear.

fromIdeoBuildingPreceptOnly.label: From ideo building precept only
fromIdeoBuildingPreceptOnly.description: If true, this recipe is only available on buildings granted by an ideoligion precept.

displayPriority.label: Display priority
displayPriority.description: Sort order in the bill list. Lower numbers appear earlier.

UIIconThing.label: UI icon thing
UIIconThing.description: ThingDef whose icon is used for this recipe in the bills UI. Defaults to the produced thing.
